description_long: This is a classic hanging lantern with a hexagonal body, suspended from a thin vertical rod. The lantern features six glass panels with a warm, yellowish tint, framed by dark, ornate metalwork that includes decorative scrollwork at the base and a detailed cap at the top. The metal appears to be wrought iron or a similar material, finished in a dark, almost black color with hints of deep red or bronze. The top of the lantern is capped with a faceted, multi-tiered structure, adding to its vintage aesthetic. The glass panels are slightly textured, diffusing the light within and giving the lantern a soft, inviting glow. This style is commonly found in urban streetscapes, parks, or historic neighborhoods, providing both illumination and decorative appeal.
description: A vintage-style hanging lantern with six yellow-tinted glass panels framed by ornate dark metalwork and decorative scrollwork, suspended from a thin rod. The lantern exudes a classic, warm ambiance suitable for urban or historic settings.
description_view_0: The lantern is seen at a slight angle, highlighting the ornate scrollwork at the base and the faceted top cap, with the glass panels and metal frame clearly visible.
description_view_1: A direct front view of the lantern, showing the symmetrical arrangement of the glass panels and the central alignment of the decorative elements.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, emphasizing the depth of the metalwork and the warm glow of the glass.
description_view_3: A straight-on view from the opposite face of view 1, displaying the even distribution of the glass panels and the intricate metal detailing.
